name: Simple CSV (Arduino Serial.print)
description:
Comma-separated values, newline-terminated. Common for Arduino firmware.
Arduino code: Serial.printf("%lu,%.2f,%.2f,%.2f,%.2f,%.2f,%.2f,%.1f,%.6f,%.6f,%.1f,%.2f,%.1f\n", millis(), pitch, yaw, roll, ax, ay, az, alt, lat, lon, pressure, batt, temp);
